DoubleAP.Description: Every AP gain is increased by 1.

Augmented1stStrike.Description: 50% increased damage on the first hit. Once per battle.

Survivor.Description: Survive fatal damage with 1 Health. Once per battle.

LuckyAim.Description: 30% chance to recover 1 AP on hitting a Weak Point.

SecondChance.Description: Revive with 100% Health. Once per battle.

SoloFighter.Description: Deal 50% more damage if fighting alone.

Teamwork.Description: 10% increased damage while all allies are alive.

SweetKill.Description: Recover 50% Health on killing an enemy.

AutoPowerful.Description: Apply Powerful for 3 turns on battle start.

AutoShell.Description: Apply Shell for 3 turns on battle start.

AutoRush.Description: Apply Rush for 3 turns on battle start.

AutoRegen.Description: Apply Regen for 3 turns on battle start.

Dodger.Description: Gain 1 AP on Perfect Dodge. Once per turn.

ManOfParry.Description: +1 AP on Parry, but damage received is doubled.

Confident.Description: Take 50% less damage, but can't be Healed.

ReviveCheer.Description: +3 AP to all allies when revived.

ReviveWithRegen.Description: Apply Regen for 3 turns when revived.

ReviveWithPower.Description: Apply Powerful for 3 turns when revived.

Solidifying.Description: +2 Shields when the character's Health falls below 50%. Once per battle.

PiercingShot.Description:
25% increased Free Aim damage.
Free Aim shots ignore Shields.

HealingDeath.Description: On death, the rest of the Expedition recover all Health.

DeathBombPhysical.Description: On Death, deal damage to all enemies.

ShieldingDeath.Description: On death, allies gain 3 Shield points.

InvertedAffinity.Description:
Apply Inverted on self for 3 turns on battle start.
50% increased damage while Inverted.

LastStand.Description: Deal 50% more damage if Health is below 10%.

SosShell.Description: Apply Shell when falling below 50% Health.

SosPower.Description: Apply Powerful when falling below 50% Health.

SosRush.Description: Apply Rush when falling below 50% Health.

DoubleBurn.Description: On applying a Burn stack, apply a second one.

HealingFire.Description: Recover 25% Health when attacking a Burning target. Once per turn.

RewardingMark.Description: +2 AP on dealing damage to a Marked target. Once per turn.

DoubleMark.Description: Mark requires 1 more hit to be removed.

Sniper.Description: First Free Aim shot each turn deals 200% increased damage and can Break.

Cheater.Description: Always play twice in a row.

PowerfulShield.Description: 10% increased damage per Shield Point on self.

BaseShield.Description: +1 Shield if not affected by any Shield on turn start.

InMediasRes.Description: +3 Shields on Battle Start, but max Health is halved.

ShieldAffinity.Description: 30% increased damage while having Shields, but receiving any damage always removes all Shields.

CriticalMoment.Description: 50% increased Critical Chance if Health is below 30%.

FasterThanStrong.Description: Always play twice in a row, but deal 50% less damage.

Warming.Description: 5% increased damage per turn. Can stack up to 5 times.

Shortcut.Description: Immediately play when falling below 30% Health. Once per battle.

RandomDefense.Description: Damage taken is randomly multiplied by a value between 50% and 200%.

GlassCanon.Description: Deal 25% more damage, but take 25% more damage.

DefensiveMode.Description: On receiving damage, consume 1 AP to take 30% less damage, if possible.

SharedCare.Description: When Healing an ally, also Heal self for 50% of that value.

EnergizingHeal.Description: On Healing an ally, also give 2 AP.

PowerfulHeal.Description: Healing an ally also applies Powerful for 1 turn.

ProtectingHeal.Description: Healing an ally also applies Shell for 1 turn.

AcceleratorHeal.Description: Healing an ally also applies Rush for 1 turn.

ConfidentFighter.Description: 30% increased damage, but can't be Healed.

HealingShare.Description: Receive 15% of all Heals affecting other characters.

WeaknessGain.Description: +1 AP on hitting an enemy's Weakness. Once per turn.

VersatileHealer.Description: +2 AP on Healing an ally. Once per turn.

BeneficialContamination.Description: +2 AP on applying a Status Effect. Once per turn.

PhysicalFighter.Description: Convert all Skill damage to Physical damage.

Roulette.Description: Every hit has a 50% chance to deal either 50% or 200% of its damage.

SoulEater.Description: Deal 30% more damage, but lose 20% Health per turn.

Painter.Description: Convert all Physical damage to Void damage.

Immaculate.Description: 30% increased damage until a hit is received.

Tainted.Description: 15% increased damage for each Status Effect on self.

FirstOffensive.Description: First hit dealt and taken deals 50% more damage.

BurningMark.Description: Apply Burn on hitting a Marked enemy.

PowerfulMark.Description: Gain Powerful on hitting a Marked enemy.

HealingMark.Description: Recover 25% Health on hitting a Marked enemy. Once per turn.

StayMarked.Description: 50% chance to apply Mark when attacking a Marked target.

FreeAimBurnShot.Description: 20% chance to Burn on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimMarkingShot.Description: 20% chance to apply Mark on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimPowerful.Description: 20% chance to gain Powerful on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimShell.Description: 20% chance to gain Shell on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimSpeed.Description: 20% chance to gain Rush on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimEnergy.Description: 20% chance to gain 1 AP on Free Aim shot.

Versatile.Description: After a Free Aim hit, Base Attack damage is increased by 50% for 1 turn.

PowerfulStrike.Description: Gain Powerful for 1 turn on Base Attack.

ShellStrike.Description: Gain Shell for 1 turn on Base Attack.

PowerlessStrike.Description: Base Attack applies Powerless for 1 turn.

DefenslessStrike.Description: Base Attack applies Defenceless for 1 turn.

ReinforcementParade.Description:
Each successful Parry increases damage by 5% until end of the following turn.
Taking any damage removes this buff.

PowerOfPain.Description: No longer gain AP on Parry. +1 AP on getting hit.

FullEnergyAttack.Description:
On every damage dealt, try to consume 1 AP.
If successful, increase damage by 20%.

SimpleBreaker.Description: 50% increased Break damage on Base Attack.

BreakMomentum.Description: Play again on Breaking a target.

BreakingStrong.Description: Gain Powerful on Breaking a target.

StunEnergy.Description: +1 AP on hitting a Stunned target with a Skill.

HealingStun.Description: Recover 5% Health on hitting a Stunned target.

BurningBreak.Description: Apply 3 Burn stacks on Breaking a target.

CriticalBreak.Description: 100% Critical Chance on hitting a Stunned target.

GradientBreak.Description: +50% of a Gradient Charge on Breaking a target.

BreakShot.Description: 50% increased Break damage with Free Aim shots.

GreatFireBreak.Description: Breaking a target doubles its Burn amount.

GradientHeal.Description: Recover 10% Health on using a Gradient Charge.

GradientStacker.Description: +15% of a Gradient Charge on Base Attack.

GradientBreaker.Description: 50% increased Break damage with Gradient Attacks.

GradientCure.Description: 50% increased Gradient Generation with Healing Skills.

GradientCounterCharge.Description: +10% of a Gradient Charge on Counterattack.

GradientWeakness.Description: +15% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Weakness. Once per turn.

GradientMark.Description: +20% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Marked target. Once per turn.

GreatHealingTint.Description: Healing Tints have double the Healing effect.

CleansingTint.Description: Healing Tints also remove all Status Effects from the target.

BigHealingTint.Description: Healing Tints now affect the whole Expedition.

BigEnergyTint.Description: Energy Tints now affect the whole Expedition.

GradientTint.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge on using an item.

APOnBurn.Description: +1 AP on applying Burn. Once per turn.

BreakDamageOnBurn.Description: 25% increased Break damage on Burning enemies.

CritChanceBurn.Description: 25% increased Critical Chance on Burning enemies.

BurningDeath.Description: Apply 3 Burn to all enemies on Death.

BreakDamageOnCrit.Description: 25% increased Break damage on Critical hits.

CritChanceOnDefenseless.Description: 25% increased Critical Chance on Defenceless enemies.

PowerDodgeCombo.Description: 5% increased damage for each consecutive successful Dodge. Can stack up to 10 times.

BreakSpecialist.Description: Break damage is increased by 50%, but base damage is reduced by 20%.

BreakingDeath.Description: Fully charge enemy's Break Bar on death.

BreakDamageOnSlow.Description: 25% increased Break damage against Slowed enemies.

LongerPowerful.Description: On applying Powerful, its duration is increased by 2.

LongerShell.Description: On applying Shell, its duration is increased by 2.

LongerRush.Description: On applying Rush, its duration is increased by 2.

EvasiveHealer.Description: Heals provided are doubled until any damage is taken.

HealOnBuff.Description: Heal 15% HP on applying a buff.

AutoDispelEnergy.Description: Dispel the first negative Status Effect received and gain 2 AP.

DispelOnAPConsume.Description: Consume 1 AP to prevent Status Effects application, if possible.

GradientOnCrit.Description: +20% of a Gradient Charge on Critical Hit. Once per turn.

GradientOnBurn.Description: +20% of a Gradient Charge on applying Burn. Once per turn.

GradientOnStun.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Stunned enemy.

GradientOnBuff.Description: +10% of a Gradient Charge on applying a Buff. Once per turn.

ParrySpecialist.Description: 25% reduced Parry window but double Counterattack damage.

DodgeSpecialist.Description: 25% reduced Dodge window, but 50% chance to gain 1 AP on successful Dodge.

BestDefense.Description: Deal 50% more damage, but can't Parry or Dodge.

BonusHealthNoDefense.Description: Reduce damage taken by 50%, but can't Parry or Dodge.

ParryDamageNoDodge.Description: Can't Dodge. +5% increased damage per Parry until damage taken.

CleasLife.Description: On turn start, if no damage taken since last turn, recover 100% Health.

SOSHealingTint.Description: Consume a Healing Tint when falling below 50% Health.

GradientParry.Description: +5% of a gradient charge on Parry.

GradientOvercharge.Description: On turn start, consume 3 Gradient Charges (if able) to deal 200% more damage this turn.

ConsumingAttack.Description: Base attack consumes up to 100 Burns to deal 10% more damage per Burn consumed.

LongerBreak.Description: Breaks last 1 more turn but the target can't be Broken twice.

Frenzy.Description: Each successive Skill hit deals 10% more damage.

DoubleThird.Description: Every third hit of a Skill deals double damage.

SlowingAttack.Description: Base attack applies Slow for 1 turn.

EmpoweredHealer.Description: Using a Healing Skill gives 50% more damage for 1 turn.

DamageShare.Description: 50% damage taken is redirected to other allies (if possible).

Feint.Description:
Start each turn with 4 Barbapapa stacks.
Every 5th hit with a Skill deals 600% more damage.

TriggerHappy.Description: After shooting 10 times in the same turn, gain +2 AP (once). And following Shots this turn deal 200% more damage.

EmpoweringJumps.Description: Counters deal 100% more damage for each successful Jump Counter this turn.

AlternatingCritical.Description: On Critical hit, 100% increased damage of the next non-Critical hit.

FirstLife.Description: 25% increased damage until death. 20% decreased damage on death. (Once)

CleasDeath.Description: On death, allies gain 25% increased damage until they die.

FestivalToken.Description: A token usable at the Festival to get prizes.

Quest_ChromaticInk.Description: Ink harvested from a Chromatic Nevron.

Quest_WoodenStick.Description: Gestrals kids are fond of good old wooden swords.

Quest_WoodBoards.Description: Several pieces of wood that do not fit together. They all have shiny bindings.

Quest_Mushroom.Description: An odd-looking mushroom. The fact that it glows means it probably should not be consumed.

Quest_OldKey.Description: An old key for an old door.

Quest_BourgeonSkin.Description: The flesh of this Nevron still feels alive.

Quest_StationKey.Description: A key. What door does it open?

Quest_ManorFamilyCanvas.Description: A canvas portrait of the Dessendre family.

Quest_CleaWorkshop_Part1.Description: A lamp that can be used to awaken the beast.

Quest_CleaWorkshop_Part2.Description: A lamp that can be used to awaken the beast.

Quest_CleaWorkshop_Part3.Description: A lamp that can be used to awaken the beast.

Quest_WeirdPictos.Description: A quick inspection is enough to say that this Pictos is unusable as is.

Quest_CakePiece.Description: A piece of cake, gifted by an ancient gestral.

Quest_CakePiece_2.Description: A piece of cake, gifted by an ancient gestral.

Quest_CakePiece_3.Description: A piece of cake, gifted by an ancient gestral.

Quest_BirthdayCake.Description: With the pieces assembled, you now hold a beautiful birthday cake.

Quest_ToyBoat.Description: A pirate ship that was lost at sea.

UpgradeMaterial_Level1.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade weapons up to level 3.

UpgradeMaterial_Level2.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade weapons up to level 9.

UpgradeMaterial_Level3.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade weapons up to level 19.

UpgradeMaterial_Level4.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade weapons up to level 32.

UpgradeMaterial_Level5.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade weapons to level 33.

ConsumableUpgradeMaterial_Health.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade the Healing Tint.

ConsumableUpgradeMaterial_AP.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade the Energy Tint.

ConsumableUpgradeMaterial_Revive.Description: Can be used at Camp to upgrade the Revive Tint.

Consumable_Energy_Level0.Description: Gives 3 AP to the targeted ally.

Consumable_Energy_Level1.Description: Gives 5 AP to the targeted ally.

Consumable_Energy_Level2.Description: Gives 7 AP to the targeted ally.

Consumable_LuminaPoint.Description: Can be consumed to give an additional Lumina Point to a character.

Consumable_Respec.Description: Can be consumed to reallocate a character's Attributes or Skill Points.

Consumable_SkillPoint.Description: Can be consumed to give an additional Skill Point to a character.
